name: Working Memory
description: Task working memory tracker — maintains current goal, subtask stack, scratchpad, active entities, and pending decisions for agent execution context.

maxSubtaskDepth.description: Maximum nesting depth for subtask stack to prevent unbounded recursion.

scratchpadMaxChars.description: Maximum characters allowed in the scratchpad before auto-compaction.

persistOnEveryUpdate.description: When true, every working memory mutation is immediately flushed to SQLite.

enabled.label: Enable Working Memory
enabled.help: Track agent task state, subtasks, scratchpad, and decisions during execution.

maxSubtaskDepth.label: Max Subtask Depth
maxSubtaskDepth.help: How deeply subtasks can be nested. Prevents infinite recursion.

scratchpadMaxChars.label: Scratchpad Size Limit
scratchpadMaxChars.help: Maximum size of the scratchpad before it is compacted.
